overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a masked character in tactical armor walking through a rainy industrial district at night. The character approaches an emergency medical scene with an ambulance and EMTs attending to a patient, pauses to observe, then continues past the vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial plaza with wet pavement

events.description: character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet industrial plaza toward the large building with illuminated mural

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking past the character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall brick building with large illuminated mural on facade
ornate tower with spires visible in the distance against the night sky
tall metal street lamp with warm glowing light
metal security fence running along the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide, rain-soaked industrial plaza at night. A pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction. The area is lit by street lamps, with a large industrial building featuring an illuminated mural dominating the view ahead, and a gothic tower visible in the distance.

events.description: character walks under the elevated metal bridge structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated tracks, passing through the shadows cast by the metal structure

entered.detail: large metal truss bridge structure spanning overhead
dark brick industrial building with multiple windows

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open plaza into the sheltered space beneath elevated train tracks. The metal truss structure blocks most of the sky, creating darker shadows. The industrial building with the mural falls behind as new brick buildings come into view on the right.

events.description: emerging from under the overpass, red ambulance with flashing lights comes into view
character slows approach toward the medical personnel and patient on gurney

agents.ego_description: approaching the emergency scene with ambulance and medical personnel attending to a patient on a gurney

notable_agents.action: EMT in reflective jacket standing beside a patient on a red gurney

entered.detail: red emergency vehicle with flashing lights parked on the wet street
red medical stretcher with a patient lying on it
corrugated metal shutter door on the industrial building facade
large red industrial dumpster against the building wall

segments.scene_description: Emerging from beneath the overpass, the character approaches an emergency medical scene. A red ambulance with flashing lights is parked ahead, with EMTs attending to a patient on a gurney. The surroundings include industrial buildings with metal roll-up doors and dumpsters.

scene_state.functional_zone: emergency medical scene in industrial alley

events.description: character stops to observe the medical personnel treating the patient
character walks around the ambulance and continues down the alley

agents.ego_description: pausing to observe the EMTs attending to an injured person, then walking around the ambulance to depart the scene

notable_agents.action: EMT kneeling beside the gurney, checking the patient's vitals
injured patient lying on the red gurney receiving medical attention

entered.detail: open rear doors of the ambulance revealing medical equipment inside
concrete block wall of the industrial building forming the alley boundary

segments.scene_description: The character stops near the ambulance to observe the medical scene, where EMTs are actively treating a patient on a gurney. After a brief pause, the character walks around the rear of the ambulance, passing the open doors, and continues down the narrow industrial alleyway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked industrial district that shifts from an open plaza into a narrow, emergency-lit alleyway. It begins with the character walking across a wide plaza under street lamps, passing a pedestrian while a large illuminated mural and a distant gothic tower frame the horizon. As the character moves forward, the open sky is replaced by the heavy shadows of a metal truss overpass, shifting the view from the mural toward weathered brick buildings. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the shelter to encounter a red ambulance with flashing lights and EMTs treating a patient on a gurney amidst industrial roll-up doors and dumpsters. After a brief pause to observe the medical scene, the camera follows the character as they navigate around the rear of the vehicle and disappear down a narrow industrial alley.
